from source import quicksort


def test_quicksort_with_duplicate_pivot_values():
    result = quicksort([3, 1, 3, 2])
    assert result == [1, 2, 3, 3], f"Expected [1, 2, 3, 3], got {result}"
    assert len(result) == 4, f"Input has 4 elements but output has {len(result)}"
